Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11293 0 0}{f 5 13 11 5 108}Oh, I see. That makes a lot of sense. You sure know a lot more than I do![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can feel my bond with Hiraga grow[n]stronger as we spend time together...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship[n]will grow stronger soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
